title: Recovered appeal: Brighton Gasworks, land bounded by Roedean Road (B2066), Marina Way and Boundary Road, Brighton and Hove (ref: 3353409 - 22 September 2025)
body: "Decision letter and Inspector’s Report for a recovered appeal for a comprehensive mixed-use redevelopment comprising site preparation and enabling works, demolition of existing buildings and structures; provision of new buildings comprising residential use and flexible non-residential floorspace, new private and communal amenity space, public realm, landscaping; car and cycle parking, highway works, access and servicing arrangements; associated plant, infrastructure and other associated works including interim works. "
